title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock to v0.8.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock) | `v0.8.0` -> `v0.8.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fgvisor-tap-vsock/v0.8.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fgvisor-tap-vsock/v0.8.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fgvisor-tap-vsock/v0.8.0/v0.8.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fgvisor-tap-vsock/v0.8.0/v0.8.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/gvisor-tap-vsock (github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock)</summary>

### [`v0.8.1`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/releases/tag/v0.8.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/compare/v0.8.0...v0.8.1)

This release fixes a few regressions in the DNS code introduced in v0.8.0, and a race condition in one of our test cases.
There are also a few dependencies updates.

#### What's Changed

-   Use all configured ipv4 dns services by [@​evidolob](https://redirect.github.com/evidolob) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/426](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/426)
-   Avoid crash with empty resolv.conf by [@​siretart](https://redirect.github.com/siretart) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/420](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/420)
-   win-sshproxy.tid created before thread id is available by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/433](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/433)

##### Dependency updates

-   build(deps): bump github.com/fsnotify/fsnotify from 1.7.0 to 1.8.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/415](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/415)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.34.2 to 1.35.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/414](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/414)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.28.0 to 0.29.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/423](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/423)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/coreos/stream-metadata-go from 0.4.4 to 0.4.5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/421](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/421)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.9.0 to 1.10.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/430](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/430)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.35.1 to 1.36.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/431](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/431)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​siretart](https://redirect.github.com/siretart) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/420](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/420)
-   [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/433](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/433)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/compare/v0.8.0...v0.8.1

</details>
